title: Plants vs. Zombies: Cubed
description: Adds characters from the Plants vs. Zombies franchise!
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GrassyDev/PvZCubed/main/previews/banner1-3.png "")

Join our Discord!

https://discord.gg/DTvZPmn67b


Support me on Patreon!

https://www.patreon.com/grassydeveloper

**New Update!**
**Adds Spikeweed, Tallnut, Gloom-shroom, Cattail, Spikerock, Shamrock, Beeshooter, Pepper-pult, Loquat, Dandelion Weed, and Smackadamia!**

**Ready**
</br>**Set**
</br>**PLANT!**
==================
<iframe width="1264" height="711" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/SxdBQ-GRTTI" title="PvZ Cubed 1.0.4.5 is FINALLY HERE! - Torchwood, Sea-shroom, Zomboni, and more!" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GrassyDev/PvZCubed/main/previews/11.png?raw=true "")

Plants vs. Zombies: Cubed is a Quilt-only mod made to bring Plants vs. Zombies content to Minecraft


The objective is to add as many plants, zombies, and references from the PvZ franchise as possible.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GrassyDev/PvZCubed/main/previews/banner2-3.png?raw=true "")


Build defenses with your favorite plants, try to survive for as long as possible against the ever-increasing zombie waves in survival mode, stage fights between plants and zombies in creative mode, hypnotize Gargantuars and ride on them, and more...

For more information about how the mod works, open the almanac, it's granted when first opening the world, but can also be crafted like this:

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GrassyDev/PvZCubed/main/previews/almanac.png?raw=true "")

To Unlock more entries, complete the advancements (Unlocked by obtaining a Sunflower Seed Packet)

<details>
<summary>All Plants!</summary>

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GrassyDev/PvZCubed/main/previews/Plants3.png?raw=true "")

</details>

<details>
<summary>All Zombies!</summary>

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GrassyDev/PvZCubed/main/previews/Zombies3.png?raw=true "")

</details>


If you found any bugs, feel free to make a new issue on this mod's Github.

If you have a suggestion of what to add, like plants, zombies, or costumes, or just want to talk about the mod in general, feel free to use the [Discussions ](https://github.com/GrassyDev/PvZCubed/discussions "Discussions") feature on this mod's Github

### **Will you port to Forge/Fabric?**
I won't make my mod for these versions, but if someone wants to, contact me beforehand.


### **Can I add to my modpack?**
Yes.
